HERMITMOD-STRIKE_HERMIT.title: Strike
HERMITMOD-DEFEND_HERMIT.title: Defend
HERMITMOD-SNAPSHOT.title: Snapshot
HERMITMOD-SNAPSHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt first.
HERMITMOD-ONE_FLASH.title: One Flash
HERMITMOD-ONE_FLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt first.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]: Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
HERMITMOD-DESPERADO.title: Desperado
HERMITMOD-DESPERADO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Double this card's damage this combat.
It costs 1 more.
HERMITMOD-HEADSHOT.title: Headshot
HERMITMOD-HEADSHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]: Deal double damage.
HERMITMOD-QUICKDRAW.title: Quickdraw
HERMITMOD-QUICKDRAW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Next turn, draw 1 less card.
HERMITMOD-WIDE_OPEN.title: Wide Open
HERMITMOD-COVET.title: Covet
HERMITMOD-COVET.description:
Discard 1 card.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Discarded [gold]Curses[/gold] are Exhausted.
HERMITMOD-HIGH_CALIBER.title: High-Caliber
HERMITMOD-HIGH_CALIBER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Strike+|Strike}[/gold] with [gold]Sharp[/gold] {SharpAmount:diff()} to your hand.
HERMITMOD-BODY_ARMOR.title: Body Armor
HERMITMOD-BODY_ARMOR.description:
Discard a card.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If it was a non-Attack, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] again.
HERMITMOD-SNIPE.title: Snipe
HERMITMOD-SNIPE.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Concentrate[/gold].
}Your next [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect triggered by Attack or Skill this turn triggers twice.
HERMITMOD-CALLED_SHOT.title: Called Shot
HERMITMOD-CALLED_SHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card played this turn triggered [gold]Dead On[/gold], draw a card.
HERMITMOD-DISSOLVE.title: Dissolve
HERMITMOD-DISSOLVE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Block is not removed at the start of your next {BlurPower:diff()} turns.
HERMITMOD-BLACK_WIND.title: Black Wind
HERMITMOD-BLACK_WIND.description:
Deal damage equal to your missing HP.{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
HERMITMOD-PURGATORY.title: Purgatory
HERMITMOD-SHADOW_CLOAK.title: Shadow Cloak
HERMITMOD-SHADOW_CLOAK.description: Whenever you draw or [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a Curse card, gain {ShadowCloakPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
HERMITMOD-DEBTS_OF_SIN.title: Debts of Sin
HERMITMOD-DEBTS_OF_SIN.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] ALL [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards from other players.
Add ALL exhausted curse cards to your hand.
HERMITMOD-FATAL_DESIRE.title: Fatal Desire
HERMITMOD-FATAL_DESIRE.description: At the start of your turn, draw {Cards:diff()} cards and add an [gold]Injury[/gold] to your hand.
HERMITMOD-GAMBIT.title: Gambit
HERMITMOD-GAMBIT.description: Put {Cards:diff()} random Attacks from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] into your hand. They cost 1 less during next play this turn.
HERMITMOD-ROUGHHOUSE.title: Roughhouse
HERMITMOD-MALICE.title: Malice
HERMITMOD-MALICE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you Exhaust a Curse, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies instead.
HERMITMOD-DEADEYE.title: Deadeye
HERMITMOD-GHOSTLY_PRESENCE.title: Ghostly Presence
HERMITMOD-GHOSTLY_PRESENCE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Dead On[/gold]:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
HERMITMOD-ADAPT.title: Adapt
HERMITMOD-ADAPT.description: At the start of your turn, you can [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card to gain {AdaptPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
HERMITMOD-DIVE.title: Dive
HERMITMOD-FLASH_POWDER.title: Flash Powder
HERMITMOD-ROULETTE.title: Roulette
HERMITMOD-ROULETTE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Discard your hand.
Draw that many cards.
HERMITMOD-MIDNIGHT.title: Midnight
HERMITMOD-MIDNIGHT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add an [gold]Impending Doom[/gold] to your hand.
HERMITMOD-GLARE.title: Glare
HERMITMOD-TAKE_COVER.title: Take Cover
HERMITMOD-TAKE_COVER.description: Add a 0-cost [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Defend+|Defend}[/gold] with [gold]Nimble[/gold] 3X to your hand.
HERMITMOD-MISFIRE.title: Misfire
HERMITMOD-MISFIRE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Shuffle a [gold]Clumsy[/gold] into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
HERMITMOD-SPRAY_PRAY.title: Spray n' Pray
HERMITMOD-SPRAY_PRAY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
Shuffle a [gold]Doubt[/gold] into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
HERMITMOD-SCAVENGE.title: Scavenge
HERMITMOD-IMPENDING_DOOM.title: Impending Doom
HERMITMOD-IMPENDING_DOOM.description: If this is [gold]Dead On[/gold] at the end of your turn, deal 13 damage to you and ALL enemies.
HERMITMOD-MEMENTO_CARD.title: Memento
HERMITMOD-MEMENTO_CARD.description: Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to you and ALL enemies.
HERMITMOD-SHORT_FUSE.title: Short Fuse
HERMITMOD-SHORT_FUSE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Costs 1 less per [gold]Strike[/gold] or [gold]Defend[/gold] played this turn.
HERMITMOD-GRUDGE.title: Grudge
HERMITMOD-SPITE.title: Spite
HERMITMOD-SPITE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards in your hand.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
HERMITMOD-MANIFEST.title: Manifest
HERMITMOD-MANIFEST.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Decay[/gold] to your hand.
HERMITMOD-FEINT.title: Feint
HERMITMOD-LOW_PROFILE.title: Low Profile
HERMITMOD-HORROR.title: Horror
HERMITMOD-HORROR.description:
Apply {BruisePower:diff()} [gold]Bruise[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Bruise[/gold] does not wear off this turn.
HERMITMOD-NO_HOLDS_BARRED.title: No Holds Barred
HERMITMOD-NO_HOLDS_BARRED.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {BruisePower:diff()} [gold]Bruise[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Lose {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
HERMITMOD-CHEAT.title: Cheat
HERMITMOD-CHEAT.description:
Play one of the top {Cards:diff()} cards in your draw pile.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]: Also trigger its [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect.
HERMITMOD-VANTAGE.title: Vantage
HERMITMOD-VANTAGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Dead On[/gold]: Draw and Upgrade {Cards:diff()} card(s).
HERMITMOD-BRAWL.title: Brawl
HERMITMOD-BRAWL.description: At the start of your turn, apply {BruisePower:diff()} [gold]Bruise[/gold] to ALL enemies.
HERMITMOD-COMBO.title: Combo
HERMITMOD-COMBO.description: Put the first {IfUpgraded:show:ComboPower:diff() |}[gold]Dead On[/gold] Attack or Skill triggered each turn back into your hand.
HERMITMOD-BIG_SHOT.title: Smoking Barrel
HERMITMOD-BIG_SHOT.description: Whenever you trigger a [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect, gain {BigShotPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
HERMITMOD-OVERWHELMING_POWER.title: Overwhelming Power
HERMITMOD-OVERWHELMING_POWER.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Whenever you end your turn with 0 Energy, lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
HERMITMOD-MAINTENANCE.title: Maintenance
HERMITMOD-MAINTENANCE.description:
Strikes deal {MaintenanceStrikePower:diff()} more damage this combat.
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
This costs 1 more each time you play it.
HERMITMOD-ETERNAL_FORM.title: Eternal Form
HERMITMOD-ETERNAL_FORM.description: First {EternalPower:diff()} playable cards drawn at the start of each turn cost 1 less that turn.
HERMITMOD-ETERNAL_SENTENCE.title: Eternal Sentence
HERMITMOD-ETERNAL_SENTENCE.description:
All cards cost 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
You can no longer gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
At the start of your turn, add a random [gold]Curse[/gold] to your hand.
HERMITMOD-FULLY_LOADED.title: Fully Loaded
HERMITMOD-FULLY_LOADED.description: Add ALL [gold]Strikes[/gold] and [gold]Defends[/gold] from your [gold]draw pile[/gold] to your hand.
HERMITMOD-GESTALT.title: Gestalt
HERMITMOD-ROUNDHOUSE_KICK.title: Roundhouse Kick
HERMITMOD-ROUNDHOUSE_KICK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Stun[/gold] any that don't intend to attack.
HERMITMOD-CURSED_WEAPON.title: Cursed Weapon
HERMITMOD-CURSED_WEAPON.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Permanently increase ALL [gold]Cursed Weapons'[/gold] damage by {Increase:diff()}.
HERMITMOD-ENERVATE.title: Enervate
HERMITMOD-ENERVATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]:
Gain Energy and draw a card.
HERMITMOD-RICOCHET.title: Ricochet
HERMITMOD-RICOCHET.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect triggered this turn, deal it again to a random enemy.{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} more times)|}
HERMITMOD-TRACKING_SHOT.title: Tracking Shots
HERMITMOD-LONE_WOLF.title: Lone Wolf
HERMITMOD-LONE_WOLF.description:
Choose a card.
It costs 0 this turn.
Discard the rest of your hand.
HERMITMOD-HIGH_NOON.title: High Noon
HERMITMOD-HIGH_NOON.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Strike[/gold] or [gold]Defend[/gold], draw a card.
HERMITMOD-REPRIEVE.title: Reprieve
HERMITMOD-TAKE_AIM.title: Take Aim
HERMITMOD-TAKE_AIM.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Concentrate[/gold].
HERMITMOD-MAGNUM.title: Magnum
HERMITMOD-MAGNUM.description:
Discard 6 cards.
For each card, deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
HERMITMOD-DETERMINATION.title: Determination
HERMITMOD-DETERMINATION.description: Whenever a debuff is applied to you, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
HERMITMOD-SHOWDOWN.title: Showdown
HERMITMOD-SHOWDOWN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Play all [gold]Strikes[/gold] in your hand to random enemies.
HERMITMOD-LUCK_OF_THE_DRAW.title: Luck of the Draw
HERMITMOD-LUCK_OF_THE_DRAW.description: Draw cards until their total cost is {Threshold:diff()} or more.
HERMITMOD-COALESCENCE.title: Coalescence
HERMITMOD-COALESCENCE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Retain[/gold] up to {Cards:diff()} cards this turn.
HERMITMOD-COALESCENCE.selectionScreenPro: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards to Retain.
HERMITMOD-PISTOL_WHIP.title: Pistol Whip
HERMITMOD-DEAD_MANS_HAND.title: Dead Man's Hand
HERMITMOD-DEAD_MANS_HAND.description:
Discard your hand.
Add the {Cards:diff()} rarest cards from your draw pile to your hand.
HERMITMOD-DEAD_OR_ALIVE.title: Dead Or Alive
HERMITMOD-DEAD_OR_ALIVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage X times.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], gain [gold]Bounty[/gold].
HERMITMOD-GOLDEN_BULLET.title: Golden Bullet
HERMITMOD-GOLDEN_BULLET.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], permanently reduce this card's cost by 1.
HERMITMOD-HOLE_UP.title: Hole Up
HERMITMOD-ITCHY_TRIGGER.title: Itchy Trigger
HERMITMOD-ITCHY_TRIGGER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Dead On[/gold]: Reduce the cost of a random card in your hand by {CostReduction:diff()} this turn.
HERMITMOD-EYE_OF_THE_STORM.title: Eye Of The Storm
HERMITMOD-FINAL_CANTER.title: Final Canter
HERMITMOD-FINAL_CANTER.description:
For each [gold]Curse[/gold] in your hand, deal {Damage:diff()} damage.{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} times)|}
HERMITMOD-HEROIC_BRAVADO.title: Heroic Bravado
HERMITMOD-HEROIC_BRAVADO.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Rugged[/gold].
Increase this card's cost by {CostIncrease:diff()} this combat.
HERMITMOD-FROM_BEYOND.title: From Beyond
HERMITMOD-FROM_BEYOND.description:
For each card in your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold], a random enemy loses {HpLoss:diff()} HP.{InCombat:
(Causes {CalculatedHits:diff()} times)|}
HERMITMOD-VIRTUE.title: Virtue
HERMITMOD-VIRTUE.description: Reduce each stackable debuff on you by {Reduce:diff()}.
